chunks.title: Jehoram's Reign and Moabite Rebellion
chunks.reason: Establishes the political context and the cause of the upcoming war.

chunks.title: The Three Kings March to Edom
chunks.reason: Describes the military alliance and the crisis of water shortage.

chunks.title: Seeking Elisha's Counsel
chunks.reason: The kings locate the prophet and engage in initial conversation.

chunks.title: Elisha's Prophecy of Water and Victory
chunks.reason: The prophet receives the word from Yahweh and delivers instructions.

chunks.title: Fulfillment of the Prophecy and Battle
chunks.reason: The water arrives, the Moabites are deceived, and Israel attacks.

chunks.title: The King of Moab's Desperate Act
chunks.reason: Concludes the narrative with the sacrifice and Israel's withdrawal.
